holdings.infoBox: IPAY is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are American Express Company stock at 6.46%, Capital One Financial at 6.28%, Visa Inc. at 6.00%, Mastercard at 5.99%, and PayPal Holdings at 5.78%.

overview.description: The Amplify Digital Payments ETF (IPAY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in financials equity. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of companies engaged in the global digital payments industry. IPAY was launched on Jul 15, 2015 and is issued by Amplify Investments.
infoTable: Nasdaq CTA Global Digital Payments Gross Total Return
